context: Emart Skincare Bangladesh blog has 38 published posts. Most recent 7 (May 2026) were auto-generated and have no featured image. Older posts may have placeholder images. Generate and upload editorial blog featured images using DALL-E or any available image generation, then set as WordPress featured image via WP REST API.

steps.how: wp --path=/var/www/wordpress --allow-root post list --post_type=post --post_status=publish --fields=ID,post_title --format=json | then check each for _thumbnail_id meta. Or: fetch via REST API with _embed=wp:featuredmedia and filter where featuredmedia is absent.

steps.action: For each post without a featured image — generate an image
rules: Image must match the blog post topic (e.g. sunscreen post → sunscreen texture/outdoor lifestyle shot)
Style: clean, bright, editorial skincare photography aesthetic
If image generation API unavailable, download a relevant royalty-free image from Unsplash using the topic keyword

steps.action: Upload image to WordPress media library
steps.how: POST /wp-json/wp/v2/media with auth Basic emartadmin:mrVDk8iqIQm81nXnew13EzzO. Set Content-Disposition: attachment; filename='post-{ID}-featured.jpg'. Set alt text to post title.

output: Report: post ID, title, image uploaded (yes/no), attachment ID. Flag any failures.
constraints: Do not touch post content — only set featured_media
Do not modify post status, categories, or tags
Do not overwrite existing featured images unless they are the default WooCommerce placeholder
